errors.sync_pending: 3X-UI temporarily unreachable; the sync task has been queued (auto-retry every minute).
errors.network: Network error — please check your connection and try again.

errors.server: Server error — please try again later.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.body: An unexpected error broke this page. Refreshing usually fixes it. If the problem keeps coming back, copy the technical detail below and let the admin know.
